title: Frau Warrens Gewerbe
writer: Eberhard Keindorff, George Bernard Shaw, Johanna Sibelius
actors: Lilli Palmer, O.E. Hasse, Johanna Matz
plot: A very proper young woman is horrified to discover not only that her mother once worked as a prostitute in order to support her, but that she later became a whorehouse madam rather than give up the business.
